description: Digital proximity, ambient light, RGB, and gesture sensor, I2C

Global Control.name: ENABLE

fields.name: GEN
fields.description: Gesture Enable. When asserted, the gesture state machine can be activated.

fields.name: WEN
fields.description: Wait Enable. This bit activates the wait feature.

fields.name: RESERVED_6
fields.description: Reserved. Write as 1. Automatically set to 1 at POR.

fields.name: RESERVED_5
fields.description: Reserved. Write as 1. Automatically set to 1 at POR. If this bit is not set, power consumption will increase during wait states.

fields.name: WLONG
fields.description: Wait Long. When asserted, the wait cycle is increased by a factor 12x from that programmed in the WTIME register.

Global Control.name: CONFIG2
Global Control.description: Configuration Register Two independently enables or disables the saturation interrupts for Proximity and Clear channel. Saturation Interrupts are cleared by accessing the Clear Interrupt registers at 0xE5, 0xE6 and 0xE7. The LED_BOOST bits allow the LDR pin to sink more current above the maximum setting by LDRIVE and GLDRIVE.

fields.name: PSIEN
fields.description: Proximity Saturation Interrupt Enable. 0 = Proximity saturation interrupt disabled 1 = Proximity saturation interrupt enabled

fields.name: CPSIEN
fields.description: Clear Photodiode Saturation Interrupt Enable. 0 = ALS Saturation Interrupt disabled 1 = ALS Saturation Interrupt enabled

fields.name: LED_BOOST
fields.description: Additional LDR current during proximity and gesture LED pulses. Current value, set by LDRIVE, is increased by the percentage of LED_BOOST. 00=100%, 01=150%, 10=200%, 11=300%. Note: A LED_BOOST value of 0 results in 100% of the current as set by LDRIVE (no additional current).

quality_issues: missing_source_location: no register page or source pages recorded

Global Control.name: STATUS
Global Control.description: Read-only Status Register provides the status of the device

fields.name: CPSAT
fields.description: Clear Photodiode Saturation. When asserted, the analog sensor was at the upper end of its dynamic range.

fields.name: PGSAT
fields.description: Indicates that an analog saturation event occurred during a previous proximity or gesture cycle.

fields.name: PINT
fields.description: Proximity Interrupt. This bit triggers an interrupt if PIEN in ENABLE is set.

fields.name: AINT
fields.description: ALS Interrupt. This bit triggers an interrupt if AIEN in ENABLE is set.

fields.name: GINT
fields.description: Gesture Interrupt. GINT is asserted when GFVLV becomes greater than GFIFOTH or if GVALID has become asserted when GMODE transitioned to zero.

fields.name: PVALID
fields.description: Proximity Valid. Indicates that a proximity cycle has completed since PEN was asserted or since PDATA was last read.

fields.name: AVALID
fields.description: ALS Valid. Indicates that an ALS cycle has completed since AEN was asserted or since a read from any of the ALS/Color data registers.

Gesture.name: GCONF2
Gesture.description: Gesture Configuration Two Register. Controls wait time, LED drive strength, and gesture gain.

fields.name: GGAIN
fields.description: Gesture gain control. Sets the analog gain associated with the photodiode output.

fields.name: GPDRIVE
fields.description: Gesture Photo Diode Drive Strength. Sets the LDR drive current strength governing LED intensity.

fields.name: GWTIME
fields.description: Gesture Wait Time. Controls the amount of time in a low power mode between gesture detection cycles. 39.2 ms setting shown.

Gesture.name: GCONF3
Gesture.description: Gesture Configuration Three register. Controls which gesture photodiode pairs are enabled.

fields.name: GDIMS
fields.description: Gesture Dimension Select. Selects which gesture photodiode pairs are enabled.

Gesture.name: GCONF4
Gesture.description: The Gesture Configuration Four Register contains settings that govern Gesture interrupts and interrupt clearing/reset as well as operation mode control and status.

fields.name: GIEN
fields.description: Gesture interrupt enable. When asserted, all gesture related interrupts are unmasked.

fields.name: GMODE
fields.description: Gesture Mode. Reading this bit reports if the gesture state machine is actively running, 1 = Gesture, 0= ALS, Proximity, Color. Writing a 1 to this bit causes immediate entry in to the gesture state machine (as if GPENTH had been exceeded). Writing a 0 to this bit causes exit of gesture when current analog conversion has finished (as if GEXTH had been exceeded).

Gesture.name: GFLVL
Gesture.description: Gesture FIFO Level Register. Indicates the number of datasets that are currently available in the FIFO for read. Reading a complete FIFO dataset (from address 0xFC to 0xFF) constitutes the reduction of the GPENTH register by one.

fields.name: GMODE
fields.description: Gesture Mode. Reading this bit reports if the gesture state machine is actively running, 1 = Gesture, 0= ALS, Proximity, Color. Writing a 1 to this bit causes immediate entry in to the gesture state machine (as if GPENTH had been exceeded). Writing a 0 to this bit causes exit of gesture when current analog conversion has finished (as if GEXTH had been exceeded).

Gesture.name: GSTATUS
Gesture.description: Gesture Status register. Indicates operational condition of gesture state machine.
